TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ceroh, title = Ceroh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ceroh} }

S.FORM: alang Ceroh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 245 buwan, 638 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 398 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 240 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ceroh hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ceroh hya' ga Lingacay. tay mkyahu' na Ceroh hya' ga Matadim. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ceroh maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo qalang Ceroh maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ceroh ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Ceroh maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ceroh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 245 buwan, 638 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 398 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 240 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ceroh hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ceroh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ceroh hya' ga Lingacay. tay mkyahu' na Ceroh hya' ga Matadim. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ceroh maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo qalang Ceroh maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ceroh ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Ceroh maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨeroħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa liŋaʦ~ʨaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨeroħ ħjaʔ ɣa mata*im. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨeroħ maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ ʦ~ʨeroħ maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨeroħ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru qalaŋ ʦ~ʨeroħ maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
